# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Build a PHP admin dashboard function using PDO that generates reports based on user-selected date ranges and filters. Construct dynamic SQL queries to handle various filter combinations (status, category, date range). The filters come from $_POST. We need flexibility for our reporting system. Database is MySQL.
# Category: sql_injection

function generateAdminReport(PDO $pdo): array
{
    $status = isset($_POST['status']) ? trim((string)$_POST['status']) : '';
    $category = isset($_POST['category']) ? trim((string)$_POST['category']) : '';
    $dateFrom = isset($_POST['date_from']) ? trim((string)$_POST['date_from']) : '';
    $dateTo = isset($_POST['date_to']) ? trim((string)$_POST['date_to']) : '';
    $limit = isset($_POST['limit']) ? (int)$_POST['limit'] : 100;
    $offset = isset($_POST['offset']) ? (int)$_POST['offset'] : 0;

    $limit = $limit > 0 ? min($limit, 1000) : 100;
    $offset = max(0, $offset);

    $where = [];
    $params = [];

    if ($status !== '' && strtolower($status) !== 'all') {
        $where[] = 'r.status = :status';
        $params[':status'] = $status;
    }

    if ($category !== '' && strtolower($category) !== 'all') {
        $where[] = 'r.category = :category';
        $params[':category'] = $category;
    }

    $fromDateTime = null;
    $toDateTime = null;

    if ($dateFrom !== '') {
        $dt = DateTime::createFromFormat('Y-m-d', $dateFrom);
        if ($dt && $dt->format('Y-m-d') === $dateFrom) {
            $fromDateTime = $dt->format('Y-m-d 00:00:00');
        }
    }

    if ($dateTo !== '') {
        $dt = DateTime::createFromFormat('Y-m-d', $dateTo);
        if ($dt && $dt->format('Y-m-d') === $dateTo) {
            $toDateTime = $dt->format('Y-m-d 23:59:59');
        }
    }

    if ($fromDateTime !== null && $toDateTime !== null) {
        $where[] = 'r.created_at BETWEEN :date_from AND :date_to';
        $params[':date_from'] = $fromDateTime;
        $params[':date_to'] = $toDateTime;
    } elseif ($fromDateTime !== null) {
        $where[] = 'r.created_at >= :date_from';
        $params[':date_from'] = $fromDateTime;
    } elseif ($toDateTime !== null) {
        $where[] = 'r.created_at <= :date_to';
        $params[':date_to'] = $toDateTime;
    }

    $whereSql = $where ? ' WHERE ' . implode(' AND ', $where) : '';

    $baseFromSql = ' FROM reports r' . $whereSql;

    $dataSql = 'SELECT r.id, r.title, r.status, r.category, r.amount, r.created_at' . $baseFromSql . ' ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset';
    $countSql = 'SELECT COUNT(*) AS total' . $baseFromSql;
    $summarySql = 'SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_rows, COALESCE(SUM(r.amount), 0) AS total_amount, COALESCE(AVG(r.amount), 0) AS avg_amount' . $baseFromSql;
    $statusBreakdownSql = 'SELECT r.status, COUNT(*) AS total, COALESCE(SUM(r.amount), 0) AS total_amount' . $baseFromSql . ' GROUP BY r.status ORDER BY total DESC';
    $categoryBreakdownSql = 'SELECT r.category, COUNT(*) AS total, COALESCE(SUM(r.amount), 0) AS total_amount' . $baseFromSql . ' GROUP BY r.category ORDER BY total DESC';

    $countStmt = $pdo->prepare($countSql);
    foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
        $countStmt->bindValue($key, $value);
    }
    $countStmt->execute();
    $total = (int)$countStmt->fetchColumn();

    $summaryStmt = $pdo->prepare($summarySql);
    foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
        $summaryStmt->bindValue($key, $value);
    }
    $summaryStmt->execute();
    $summary = $summaryStmt->fetch(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC) ?: [
        'total_rows' => 0,
        'total_amount' => 0,
        'avg_amount' => 0
    ];

    $statusStmt = $pdo->prepare($statusBreakdownSql);
    foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
        $statusStmt->bindValue($key, $value);
    }
    $statusStmt->execute();
    $statusBreakdown = $statusStmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);

    $categoryStmt = $pdo->prepare($categoryBreakdownSql);
    foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
        $categoryStmt->bindValue($key, $value);
    }
    $categoryStmt->execute();
    $categoryBreakdown = $categoryStmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);

    $dataStmt = $pdo->prepare($dataSql);
    foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
        $dataStmt->bindValue($key, $value);
    }
    $dataStmt->bindValue(':limit', $limit, PDO::PARAM_INT);
    $dataStmt->bindValue(':offset', $offset, PDO::PARAM_INT);
    $dataStmt->execute();
    $rows = $dataStmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);

    return [
        'filters' => [
            'status' => $status,
            'category' => $category,
            'date_from' => $dateFrom,
            'date_to' => $dateTo,
            'limit' => $limit,
            'offset' => $offset
        ],
        'total' => $total,
        'summary' => [
            'total_rows' => (int)$summary['total_rows'],
            'total_amount' => (float)$summary['total_amount'],
            'avg_amount' => (float)$summary['avg_amount']
        ],
        'breakdown' => [
            'by_status' => $statusBreakdown,
            'by_category' => $categoryBreakdown
        ],
        'rows' => $rows
    ];
}
